title: Need more automation support for column types
excerpt: We need to be able to make Automation decisions based on formula column values.  Formula columns is just one column however.  Automations needs support for using values from other column types as well.

posts.author: nathannicholas (Nathan Nicholas)
posts.cookedHtml: We need to be able to make Automation decisions based on formula column values. Formula columns is just one column however. Automations needs support for using values from other column types as well.
